---
title: "Cordelia Anne Duke Oldfield"
---

## Cordelia Anne Duke Oldfield

**Dates:** (1807-1864)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Daughter of WCY’s eldest brother, the Rev. Duke Yonge, Vicar of Antony, and Cordelia (Colborne) Yonge, stepsister of FMY.  This younger Cordelia Yonge, known as Delia, married (1849), as his third wife, General John Oldfield (1789-2 Aug 1863), aide de camp to the Queen Her sole executor was her brother Dr John Francis Duke Yonge.  Her husband had 15 children by his first and second wives and none by her.  His executor was his son Colonel John Rawdon Oldfield of Oldfield Lawn, Westbourne  [information from Ian Yonge].  Delia Oldfield\'s dates were 25 Nov 1807-6 Sept 1864.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 4th [1863]
- Letter from Friday [17 March 1854]
- Letter from March 14. 1849
- Letter from April 19th  [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
